---
layout: default
title: "Political Realignment and Cabinet Policy Expansion"
date: 2026-07-15T10:17:56.313731+00:00
summary: "The Union Cabinet approves a major semiconductor mission, while the INDIA bloc faces internal friction over potential support for key government legislation"
run_time_ist: "3:47PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 3:47PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>NCP (SP) stance on legislation:</strong> The Sharad Pawar-led NCP (SP) faces scrutiny over its potential support for the government&#x27;s Delimitation and Women’s Reservation Bills, though party leadership has denied backdoor deals with the BJP.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>NEP implementation defense:</strong> The Centre, CBSE, and NCERT have formally defended the implementation of the National Education Policy’s three-language formula in the Supreme Court against ongoing legal challenges.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Semiconductor Mission 2.0:</strong> The Union Cabinet has approved the expanded India Semiconductor Mission (ISM) 2.0, allocating over ₹1.27 lakh crore to bolster long-term domestic semiconductor manufacturing.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Poll official honorarium:</strong> The Election Commission has sanctioned a one-time ₹6,000 honorarium for poll officials assigned to Systematic Voters&#x27; Education and Electoral Participation (SVEEP) duty.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
</ul>
